revision.text: converts imperial fluid ounces to millilitres and US fl oz.

<includeonly>{{template doc page transcluded}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{template doc page viewed directly}}</noinclude> <!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE --> This is a template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes.
<includeonly>
<!-- ADD CATEGORIES BELOW THIS LINE --> [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]
<!-- ADD INTERWIKIS BELOW THIS LINE -->
</includeonly>

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as {{tlf|convert}}'s. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Feilds for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default to to abbreiviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}}" If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}}" The template currently ignors any secondary numerical value. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as {{tlf|convert}}'s. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Feilds for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default to to abbreiviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}}" If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}}" The template currently ignors any secondary numerical value. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}}" Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as {{tlf|convert}}'s. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Feilds for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default to to abbreiviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}}" If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}}" The template currently ignors any secondary numerical value. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}}" Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as {{tlf|convert}}'s. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Feilds for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default to to abbreiviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}}" Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}}" The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as {{tlf|convert}}'s. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Feilds for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default to to abbreiviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}}" ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. *{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}}" *{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical feilds blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if ther eis a sixth) unnamed parameter as shomn in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as {{tlf|convert}}'s. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Feilds for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default to to abbreiviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|ft2}}" ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. *{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}}" *{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical feilds blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||ft2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|ft2}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||ft2|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as used by {{tlf|convert}}. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Fields for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default is to abbreviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}}" ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. *{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}}" *{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical feilds blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{template doc page transcluded}}{{template doc page viewed directly}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Even parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Odd parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as used by {{tlf|convert}}. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Fields for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default is to abbreviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}}" ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. *{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}}" *{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical fields blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||usoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||usoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|usoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|usoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||usoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

"{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}}" *{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical fields blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" ==See also== {{Math templates|conversion}} [[Category:Conversion templates|Convinfobox]]

{{Documentation subpage}} This template is based on {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use in infoboxes. It accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Odd parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Even parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as used by {{tlf|convert}}. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Fields for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default is to abbreviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}}" ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. *{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical fields blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" ==See also== {{Math templates|conversion}} [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/wrapper templates|Infobox]] [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/documentation‎|Infobox]]

"{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical fields blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter sigfig. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" ==See also== {{Math templates|conversion}} [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/wrapper templates|Infobox]] [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convinfobox| ]] [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/documentation|Infobox]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template is a frontend for {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use within the code for a template, where the input is not known ''a priori''. For unit conversions within articles, one should use {{tl|convert}} directly. This template accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Odd parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Even parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as used by {{tlf|convert}}. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Fields for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default is to abbreviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}}" ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. *{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}}" *{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Leaving all numerical fields blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter {{para|sigfig|}}. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" ==See also== {{Math templates|conversion}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/wrapper templates|Infobox]] [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convinfobox| ]] }} [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/documentation|Infobox]]

{{Documentation subpage}} This template is a frontend for {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use within the code for a template, where the input is not known ''a priori''. For unit conversions within articles, one should use {{tl|convert}} directly. This template accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Odd parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Even parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as used by {{tlf|convert}}. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. *The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). *Fields for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. *The default is to abbreviate units (where abbreviations exist). *Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}}" ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. *{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}}" *{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} gives "{{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}}" *{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}}" *{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} gives "{{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}}" Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. *{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} gives "{{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}}" Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. *{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}}" *{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}}" ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. *{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}}" *{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}}" ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter {{para|sigfig|}}. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}}" *{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} gives "{{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}}" *{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}}" *{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} gives "{{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}}" ==Leaving all numerical fields blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. *{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} gives "{{convinfobox||m2||sqft}}" *{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}} gives "{{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}}" ==See also== {{Math templates|conversion}} {{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox | | [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/wrapper templates|Infobox]] [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convinfobox| ]] }} [[Category:Subtemplates of Template Convert/documentation|Infobox]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} {{Lua|Module:ConvertIB}} This template is a frontend for {{tl|convert}}. It is intended as a meta-template for use within the code for a template, where the input is not known ''a priori''. For unit conversions within articles, one should use {{tl|convert}} directly. This template accepts from four to seven unnamed parameters. Odd parameters must be numerical (or empty) and specify the numerical value of a measurement and the intended precision of the conversion. Even parameters must be unit codes as used in {{tlf|convert}}. Named parameters are the same as used by {{tlf|convert}}. This template differs from {{tlf|convert}} in the following respects. * The units to convert to and the units to convert from must be specified (therefore there are no default convert-to units). * Fields for the numerical value of a measurement may be left blank. * The default is to abbreviate units (where abbreviations exist). * Range conversions are not available. This template may be used when it is unknown in which direction the conversion is to be made. The direction is determined as shown in the following examples. * {{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}} → {{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft}} * {{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}} → {{convinfobox||m2|100|sqft}} ==Dual conversions== Dual conversions may be performed by adding a fifth (possibly blank) and sixth unnamed parameter. * {{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}} → {{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz||USoz}} * {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}} → {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz}} * {{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}} → {{convinfobox||ml||impoz|32|USoz}} ==Paired units== Length may be expressed in feet and inches. * {{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} → {{convinfobox|180|cm||ft||in}} * {{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} → {{convinfobox||cm|5|ft||in}} * {{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} → {{convinfobox||cm||ft|120|in}} * {{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} → {{convinfobox||cm|5|ft|6|in}} * {{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} → {{convinfobox||ft||in|180|cm}} * {{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} → {{convinfobox|5|ft||in||cm}} * {{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} → {{convinfobox||ft|120|in||cm}} * {{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} → {{convinfobox|5|ft|6|in||cm}} Similarly, mass may be expressed in pounds and ounces. * {{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} → {{convinfobox|8.5|kg||lb||oz}} * {{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} → {{convinfobox||kg|4|lb|3|oz}} Mass may also be expressed in stone and pounds. * {{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} → {{convinfobox|65|kg||st||lb}} * {{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} → {{convinfobox||kg|10|st||lb}} * {{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} → {{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb}} * {{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} → {{convinfobox||kg||st|145|lb}} ==Specifying more than one value== The template currently bases conversions on the first non-blank numerical value ignoring any secondary or tertiary values. * {{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} → {{convinfobox|100|m2|100|sqft}} * {{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}} → {{convinfobox|375|ml|40|impoz||USoz}} * {{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}} → {{convinfobox|375|ml||impoz|32|USoz}} * {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}} → {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz|32|USoz}} ==Rounding== As with {{tlf|convert}} rounding can be done automatically or manually by specifying the precision and/or number of significant figures in the converted value. The number of significant figures can be determined by the parameter {{para|sigfig|}}. The precision can be determined by the fifth (if there is no sixth) or seventh (if there is a sixth) unnamed parameter as shown in the examples below. * {{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} → {{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|4}} * {{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} → {{convinfobox|100|m2||sqft|sigfig=4}} * {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}} → {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|2}} * {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}} → {{convinfobox||ml|40|impoz||USoz|sigfig=3}} * {{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} → {{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|3}} * {{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} → {{convinfobox||kg|10|st|7|lb|sigfig=5}} Specify precision "0" to prevent rounding of values ending in zero: * kilograms (kg) ** with "0": {{convinfobox|110|kg||lb|0}} → {{convinfobox|110|kg||lb|0}} ** without: {{convinfobox|110|kg||lb}} → {{convinfobox|110|kg||lb}} * pounds (lb) ** with "0": {{convinfobox||kg|240|lb|0}} → {{convinfobox||kg|240|lb|0}} ** without: {{convinfobox||kg|240|lb}} → {{convinfobox||kg|240|lb}} * metres (m) ** with "0": {{convinfobox|100|m||ft|0}} → {{convinfobox|100|m||ft|0}} ** without: {{convinfobox|100|m||ft}} → {{convinfobox|100|m||ft}} * inches (in) ** with "0": {{convinfobox||cm|100|in|0}} → {{convinfobox||cm|100|in|0}} ** without: {{convinfobox||cm|100|in}} → {{convinfobox||cm|100|in}} ==Leaving all numerical fields blank== If all numerical value fields are left blank the template returns nothing. * {{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} → {{convinfobox||m2||sqft}} * {{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}} → {{convinfobox||ml||impoz||USoz}} ==See also== ; Supporting templates * [[Template:Convert]] (invokes [[Module:Convert]]) ; Templates transcluding {{tl|convinfobox}} {{Collapsible list | framestyle = border 1px; | titlestyle = text-align:left;background-color:lightgrey; | # [[Template:Infobox rugby biography]] # [[Template:Infobox rugby league biography]] # [[Template:Infobox sportsperson]] #* [[Template:Infobox biathlete]] (via [[Template:Infobox sportsperson]]) #* [[Template:Infobox boxer (amateur)]] (via [[Template:Infobox sportsperson]]) #* [[Template:Infobox sailor]] (via [[Template:Infobox sportsperson]]) #* [[Template:Infobox speed skater]] (via [[Template:Infobox sportsperson]]) #* [[Template:Infobox sport wrestler]] (via [[Template:Infobox sportsperson]]) #* [[Template:Infobox swimmer]] (via [[Template:Infobox sportsperson]]) #
